# Burst2GIF by boost.photo

> Burst2GIF is a Lightroom Classic plugin for macOS that converts burst photo sequences into smooth MP4 videos or animated GIFs directly inside Lightroom. It preserves all Lightroom edits, auto-detects FPS from EXIF data, supports up to 6K resolution, and reduces the burst-to-animation workflow from 8+ minutes to 10 seconds. Priced at $39 one-time (lifetime license) with a free tier of 10 exports.

## Key Facts

- **Product**: Burst2GIF Lightroom Classic Plugin
- **Website**: https://boost.photo
- **Developer**: Marek Topolar, wedding photographer with 200+ weddings
- **Platform**: macOS only (Windows planned)
- **Pricing**: Free (10 exports, 1500px max) or $39 lifetime (unlimited exports, 6K)
- **Category**: Photography software, Lightroom plugin, multimedia tool
- **Use cases**: Wedding photography, family portraits, wildlife, sports, time-lapses, stop-motion

## How It Works

1. Select burst photos in Lightroom's Library module
2. Click Export and preview the animation with adjustable FPS
3. Export as MP4 (H.264) or GIF — optionally import back to Lightroom with correct capture time

- [Blog](https://boost.photo/blog): Photography tutorials and guides
